channel.title: Blog on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Day 2, Part 1, Gift Shop
item.description: This is my solution to https://adventofcode.com/2025/day/2. The Gist Given a list of comma-separated number ranges, scan for invalid IDs formed by a sequence of digits repeated exactly twice (such as 55 or 123123) with no leading zeroes, and calculate the total sum of these numbers. Slicing numbers without string manipulation Using pure math is better than string manipulation because… Math happens in the stack, string manipulation needs memory on the heap.

item.title: The Best Time to Learn
item.description: How AI can help you develop As the general gust of fear of AI replacing humans and their meaning spreads throughout the internet, this article refrshingly ponders whether AI could in fact create high level programmers at a faster rate. https://terriblesoftware.org/2025/02/10/the-rise-of-the-junior-developer/

item.title: Typography: Ongoing Resourse List
item.description: Definitions Typeface: what it looks like Font: how it’s delivered, size, weight etc Typography: how it’s arranged, line height, letter spacing etc Links https://fontsinuse.com/ https://www.typewolf.com/ Material Design 2 Typography Guide https://m2.material.io/design/typography/the-type-system.html#type-scale

item.title: Day 1, Secret Entrance
item.description: This is my solution to https://adventofcode.com/2025/day/1. Part 1 The Gist Given a list of instructions for turning a 100 position circular safe dial (numbered 0 to 99), track the position of the dial as we spin it left and right, and count how many times it lands on exactly 0. Notes on Modulus on Negative Numbers In Go, % doesn’t mean modulo, it means remainder. Because of this, it cannot be used directly to find the modulus of negative numbers.

item.title: I like to roar
item.description: Hi, quick update from me. I just want to let everyone know that I like roaring. Hello hekoegkergt srhueausjk eatj sgh```

item.title: Today I made friends
item.description: I got lost in the woods today. Two friends, a Meerkat and a Warthog, found me, sung a song with me and gave my life new meaning. Today was a good day.
